title: gliricidia cubensis
intro: Gliricidia cubensis, also known as Cuban ironwood, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its hardwood tree with a broad canopy. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gliricidia cubensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce cholesterol. In herbal preparations, Gliricidia cubensis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its bark and leaves are used to create medicinal extracts.
